digest.component_or_area: autolander service observability and read-only status endpoint
propositions: A read-only HTTP status endpoint on the bot serves JSON with the current wipChain (change, phase, tested_shas, time-in-phase), the count of Autosubmit-waiting changes, and heartbeat_age_s, reachable via nginx at /autolander/status.

An error metric autolander_errors is published from three feeders: the AUTOLANDER_ERROR marker on unhandled errors, the AUTOLANDER_HANDBACK marker on stack hand-backs, and the container unhealthy Docker health-state.
Markers are single stdout lines of a bare token followed by a compact JSON object, and observability.sh greps the leading token to count occurrences.
A stuck-but-alive bot is made visible via an autolander_time_in_phase_seconds CloudWatch metric emitted each poll while non-idle, with an alarm defined on that metric rather than the status JSON.

Time-to-land is emitted as autolander_time_to_land_seconds using individual Value datapoints per landed change (not StatisticValues) so downstream percentiles come from CloudWatch extended statistics.
The service logs only to container stdout and never writes session_log.
